meta.description: An environment-specific rollout configuration for a feature flag.

enabled.description: Whether the flag is enabled in this environment.

rolloutPercentage.description: Percentage of users who see the flag enabled (0–100).

sqlSchema:
CREATE TABLE "obj_5a94c719_d1f6_44c3_b806_ce0c225b2b30" (
    item_id UUID NOT NULL,
    "environment" TEXT,
    "enabled" BOOLEAN,
    "rollout_percentage" INTEGER,
    CONSTRAINT "pk_obj_5a94c719_d1f6_44c3_b806_ce0c225b2b30" PRIMARY KEY (item_id),
    CONSTRAINT "fk_5a94c719d1f644c3_item" FOREIGN KEY (item_id) REFERENCES items(id)
)
